industry.description: The industry the company operates in.

city.description: The city where the company is located.

state.description: The state where the company is located.

country.description: The country where the company is located.

companies.description: Array of companies to update (max 100 per request).

user_id.description: User ID or email. Example: "12345" or "user@example.com"

id_property.description: Property type for the user_id. Use EMAIL if user_id is an email, USER_ID if it is a user ID.

role_id.description: Role ID to assign to the user. Example: "1234"

primary_team_id.description: Primary team ID to assign to the user. Example: "5678"

secondary_team_ids.description: Array of secondary team IDs to assign to the user. Example: ["9101", "1121"]

email_id.description: The email ID to clone. Example: "38175169118"

clone_name.description: The name to assign to the cloned email. Example: "Cloned Newsletter"

language.description: The language code for the cloned email, such as "en" for English. Example: "en"

from_object_type.description: The type of the object to associate from. Example: "contacts", "companies", "deals", "tickets"

from_object_id.description: The ID of the object to associate from. Example: "12345"

to_object_type.description: The type of the object to associate to. Example: "contacts", "companies", "deals", "tickets"

to_object_id.description: The ID of the object to associate to. Example: "67890"

association_type.description: The association type identifier. If not provided, a default association will be created.

association_category.description: The category of the association type. Required if association_type is provided.

email.description: Email address of the contact. Example: "john.doe@example.com"

firstname.description: First name of the contact. Example: "John"

lastname.description: Last name of the contact. Example: "Doe"

phone.description: Phone number of the contact. Example: "+1 555-1234"

company.description: Company name of the contact. Example: "Acme Inc"

website.description: Website URL of the contact. Example: "https://example.com"

amount.description: Deal amount in company currency. Example: 50000

closedate.description: Expected close date. ISO 8601 format. Example: "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"

hubspot_owner_id.description: Owner ID to assign the deal to. Example: "12345678"

name.description: The name of the marketing email. Example: "Newsletter March 2024"

subject.description: The subject line of the email. Example: "Check out our latest updates!"

html_body.description: The HTML content of the email body.

text_body.description: The plain text content of the email body.

from_name.description: The display name for the email sender.

from_email.description: The email address of the sender.

template_path.description: The path to a HubSpot template. Example: "@hubspot/email/dnd/welcome.html"

body.description: The note text content. Limited to 65,536 characters.

timestamp.description: The note timestamp in ISO 8601 UTC format (e.g., "2021-11-12T15:48:22Z") or Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

owner_id.description: The HubSpot owner ID associated with the note.

attachment_ids.description: IDs of attachments to associate with the note.

object_id.description: The ID of the record to associate the note with.

association.description: The association to a contact, company, deal, or ticket.

object_type.description: The CRM object type for which the property will be created. Example: "contacts"

name.description: The internal name of the property (lowercase, alphanumeric and underscores only). Example: "favorite_food"

label.description: The display name of the property as shown in HubSpot. Example: "Favorite Food"

type.description: The data type of the property. Example: "string"

field_type.description: The field type determines the input widget shown in HubSpot. Example: "text"

group_name.description: The property group the property belongs to. Defaults to "contactinformation". Example: "contactinformation"

description.description: A description of the property. Example: "The users favorite food"

display_order.description: The order the property appears in its group. Example: 1

options.description: Required for enumeration field types (select, checkbox, radio). Array of option objects with label and value.

subject.description: The title/subject of the task. Example: "Call John about the proposal"

type.description: The type of task. Example: "CALL", "EMAIL", "TODO", "MEETING", "LINKED_IN", "LINKED_IN_MESSAGE", "LINKED_IN_CONNECT", "WHATSAPP", "SMS", "NEXT_STEP", "SCHEDULE_MEETING", "DEMO". Defaults to "TODO"

priority.description: The priority of the task. Options: "LOW", "MEDIUM", "HIGH". Defaults to "MEDIUM"

due_date.description: The due date for the task in ISO 8601 format (e.g., "2024-03-15T10:00:00Z"). Example: "2024-03-15T10:00:00Z"

notes.description: The body/notes of the task. Example: "Remember to mention the discount offer"

assignee_id.description: The HubSpot owner ID (user ID) to assign the task to. Example: "12345678"

contact_ids.description: Array of contact IDs to associate the task with. Example: ["123", "456"]

company_ids.description: Array of company IDs to associate the task with. Example: ["789", "012"]

deal_ids.description: Array of deal IDs to associate the task with. Example: ["345", "678"]

id.description: The unique ID of the created task

due_date.description: The due date of the task

assignee_id.description: The HubSpot owner ID assigned to the task

subject.description: The ticket subject/title. Example: "Support request for login issue"

content.description: The ticket description/content. Example: "User cannot log in to their account"

email.description: The email address of the user to create. Example: "user@example.com"

first_name.description: The first name of the user. Example: "John"

last_name.description: The last name of the user. Example: "Doe"

role_id.description: The ID of the role/permission set to assign to the user. Example: "12345"

team_id.description: The ID of the primary team to assign the user to. Example: "67890"

send_welcome_email.description: Whether to send a welcome email to the user. Defaults to true if not specified.

workflow_id.description: The unique identifier for the workflow to delete. Example: "123456789"

id.description: HubSpot Company ID to delete. Example: "123456789"

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to delete. Example: "12345"

user_id.description: HubSpot user ID. Example: "12345678". Can also be an email address if using the optional idProperty query parameter.

id_property.description: Property to use for identifying the user. Defaults to USER_ID. Use EMAIL if passing an email address as user_id.

object_type.description: The object type for which to fetch pipelines (e.g., "deals", "tickets"). Defaults to "deals".
